name: Al Ashram Contracting
message: Al Ashram is one of the UAE’s leading construction companies. For more than 45 years we have played a key role in the growth of the UAE and helped to define the skyline of this progressive nation.  From towering skycrapers to complex underground infrastructure projects, we have the capabilities and experience to meet the demands and challenges of projects of varying scale and scope in the ever-evolving construction sector.
